properties.comment: Temporal Sequenced Rewrites Test Cases for SPJ queries
properties.entry: SEQUENCED TEMPORAL ( WITH outr AS ( SELECT * FROM t_tc WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) r), d AS ( SELECT DISTINCT a,b FROM outr r ) SELECT * FROM outr o, (SELECT AVG(s.c) AS x, d.a, d.b FROM t_tc WITH TIME (t_b, t_e) s, d WHERE s.a = d.a AND s.b <> d.b GROUP BY d.a, d.b ) sub WHERE o.c < x AND o.a = sub.a AND o.b = sub.b );
